title: 384 Well Plate PCR Plate with Triplicates
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol preps a 384 well plate for up to 8 cDNA samples in triplicates. The protocol can be broken down into 2 main parts: * cDNA is added in triplicates down the column onto the plate. * Mastermix is added to the cDNA. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of cDNA`: Specify the number of cDNA tubes that will be loaded onto the tube rack. * `Number of mastermix tubes`: Specify the number of mastermix tubes that will be added to the cDNA. * `cDNA/mastermix volume`: Specify the volume of both the cDNA and mastermix. Note, the mastermix volume will be calculated from this volume (total 20ul). * `P20 Mount`: Specify the mount (left or right) for the P20 single channel pipette. ---
cDNA is transferred in triplicates down a column up to the number of columns as specified in number of mastermixes.
Mastermixes are added to each column up to each populated row.
